title: French Stew with Fragrant Mushrooms
description: A hearty French stew featuring rich flavors and fragrant mushrooms, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Season the stew meat with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat. Sear the stew meat until browned, then remove and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add more oil if necessary. Add the sliced onions and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the browned stew meat, thyme, and red wine to the pot. Stir to combine.
Add the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Braise the stew at 300°F (150°C) for 2-3 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the flour to thicken the stew.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
